calendar.matters:
MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
ALEC CIERNY, ESQ., THE CIERNY FIRM 415.259.4646 Attorney for Plaintiff AIRASSIGNMENT, LLC
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not argued. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AIR ASSIGNMENT, LLC MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT

Plaintiff Air Assignment, LLC's motion to enforce settlement is denied. Although the motion is unopposed, the moving papers fail to provide sufficient competent evidence to warrant granting of the motion. The sole factual support for the contention that defendant Michael Schaecher breached the settlement agreement is one sentence in an attorney declaration. That declaration provides no foundation how the declarant has knowledge of the asserted breach. This is particularly problematic since the settlement agreement does not provide that the attorney is involved in the receipt of the settlement payments. Moreover, the motion papers do not adequately support the requests for liquidated damages, attorney's fees or sanction

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
